title: Backend Developer Vacancy at IBM India International Enterprises - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at IBM India International Enterprises - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
IBM India International Enterprises has an exciting opening for a Backend Developer at our Ludhiana office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About IBM India International Enterprises:
IBM India International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Machine Learning

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Flexible working hours
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IBM India International Enterprises!
